name: JoAi: Delete Scheduled Task

description.en: Cancel and delete a scheduled task or recurring automation.
description.de: Breche eine geplante Aufgabe oder wiederkehrende Automatisierung ab und lösche sie.

bot: Use this when the user wants to cancel, stop, remove, or delete a scheduled task. The task ID is required — if the user doesn't provide one, list tasks first to find it.

inputs.name: Task ID

description.en: The ID of the scheduled task to delete
description.de: Die ID der zu löschenden geplanten Aufgabe

inputs.bot: The task hash ID. If the user refers to a task by name or description, list tasks first to find the matching ID.
